subcodes.first_line: The One Who is mentioned hath not forgotten them that make mention of Him, and the Desired One hath not deprived them that seek Him of the effulgent rays of His light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مذکور ذاکر خود را فراموش نفرموده و مقصود قاصد را از تجلیات انوار خود محروم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God
